name: G1 1st Floor — Western Sections Wandering (1-in-10)
description: Wandering monster table for the western sections of G1 1st Floor (west of the Great Hall). Encounter frequency: 1 in 10. Roll 1d10; on a 1, roll 1d4 on this table.

results.text: 4–12 orcs rushing to get shields for platters
2 hill giants from Room 11 going to sleep off a drunk
3 ogres from Room 11 going to get one of the guards
1 hill giant from Room 11 taking a stroll
